component.name: OpenVPN 3 Linux
component.summary: Native GTK desktop client and CLI for OpenVPN 3 Linux

description.p: OpenVPN 3 Linux Client is a native GTK4 and libadwaita desktop application and companion CLI for managing OpenVPN 3 Linux profiles, sessions, diagnostics, and launch behavior.

It integrates directly with the OpenVPN 3 Linux D-Bus services, supports `.ovpn` file imports and `openvpn://` onboarding links, and installs native desktop assets such as the application launcher, icons, URI handlers, and optional close-to-tray behavior where the desktop supports StatusNotifier.

ul.li: Initial native Linux release with GTK4 desktop UI and companion CLI.
Added close-to-tray behavior with StatusNotifier support where available.
Added DEB and RPM native packaging with launcher, icon, MIME, and URI assets.
